Who I Am

About Me

I'm a Computer Engineering student from Kathmandu, Nepal, with a strong focus on backend development using Django and Python. I enjoy building clean, functional web applications and understanding how things work under the hood.

Beyond backend systems, I'm familiar with C/C++ and low-level problem-solving, and I've participated in multiple national hackathons building AI-driven tools under real time pressure.

🎵 Fun fact: I write songs, sing, and code — creativity fuels my logic.

Real-World Work

Experience

⚡
Backend Developer — Hackathon Participant
Multiple National & Online Hackathons · 2024–Present
Designed and implemented core backend logic under strict 24–48 hour time constraints. Worked on AI-driven systems including fake news detection, regulatory automation, and decision-support tools. Collaborated in cross-functional teams using Git workflows and translated problem statements into scalable technical solutions focused on real-world impact.
Backend Architecture API Design AI/ML Logic System Thinking Team Collaboration Rapid Prototyping
🏆
Backend Developer — Team Unhandled Promise
RegulAI · HackForBusiness · CodeYatra 2.0
Competed as part of Team Unhandled Promise across multiple hackathon events. Built RegulAI — an AI system that converts complex regulations into actionable steps for SMEs. Contributed to Setu — a citizen-centric e-governance platform bridging Nepali citizens and government offices with eligibility checks and a unified services portal.
Django Python TypeScript JavaScript AI Integration
